---
format: html
title: interpolate_community_dataset_from_shared_inputs()
---

<html><head>
<meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=yes" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.css">
<script type="text/javascript">
const macros = { "\\R": "\\textsf{R}", "\\mbox": "\\text", "\\code": "\\texttt"};
function processMathHTML() {
    var l = document.getElementsByClassName('reqn');
    for (let e of l) { katex.render(e.textContent, e, { throwOnError: false, macros }); }
    return;
}</script>
<script defer src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.js"
    onload="processMathHTML();"></script>
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="R.css" />
</head><body><div class="container"><main>

<table style="width: 100%;"><tr><td>interpolate_community_dataset_from_shared_inputs</td><td style="text-align: right;">R Documentation</td></tr></table>

<h2>Interpolate Community Dataset from Shared Inputs</h2>

<h3>Description</h3>

<p>Filters shared paleo community preprocessing inputs to one dataset
and interpolates that dataset.
</p>


<h3>Usage</h3>

<pre><code class='language-R'>interpolate_community_dataset_from_shared_inputs(
  data_interpolation_index,
  data,
  data_age_uncertainty,
  n_cores = 1L,
  ...
)
</code></pre>


<h3>Arguments</h3>

<table role = "presentation">
<tr><td><code id="data_interpolation_index">data_interpolation_index</code></td>
<td>
<p>A metadata object produced by [make_community_interpolation_index()].
It must contain 'dataset_name' and 'flag_empty' elements.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="data">data</code></td>
<td>
<p>Shared or regular community proportion data with a 'dataset_name'
column.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="data_age_uncertainty">data_age_uncertainty</code></td>
<td>
<p>Shared or regular age-uncertainty data with a 'dataset_name' column.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="n_cores">n_cores</code></td>
<td>
<p>Number of cores passed to
[interpolate_community_data_with_uncertainty()]. Dynamic target
branches should use '1L'.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="...">...</code></td>
<td>
<p>Additional arguments passed to
[interpolate_community_data_with_uncertainty()].</p>
</td></tr>
</table>


<h3>Details</h3>

<p>The function keeps dynamic branch payloads small by receiving only a
dataset identifier and filtering larger shared inputs inside the
branch.
</p>


<h3>Value</h3>

<p>A data frame with columns 'dataset_name', 'taxon', 'age', and
'value'.
</p>


<h3>See Also</h3>

<p>[make_community_interpolation_index()],
[interpolate_community_data_with_uncertainty()]
</p>


<h3>Examples</h3>

<pre><code class='language-R'>data_example &lt;- tibble::tibble(
  dataset_name = "core_a",
  sample_name = "sample_a",
  taxon = "Taxon",
  age = 0,
  value = 1
)
data_uncertainty &lt;- tibble::tibble(
  dataset_name = base::character(),
  sample_name = base::character(),
  iteration = base::integer(),
  age_uncertainty = base::numeric()
)
index &lt;- base::list(dataset_name = "core_a", flag_empty = FALSE)
interpolate_community_dataset_from_shared_inputs(
  data_interpolation_index = index,
  data = data_example,
  data_age_uncertainty = data_uncertainty,
  age_min = 0,
  age_max = 500,
  timestep = 500
)
</code></pre>

</main>

</div>
</body></html>
